behaviors.behavior: Shell scroller reserves no scrollbar gutter
behaviors.evidence: client shell-scroll-invariant.test.ts > reserves NO scrollbar gutter - PASS; mutation-verified (re-adding the gutter turns it RED)

behaviors.behavior: Every title-bar route bounds its own vertical scroll
behaviors.evidence: client shell-scroll-invariant.test.ts > every route that renders a title bar bounds its own vertical scroll - PASS; mutation-verified (unbounding Settings turns it RED)

behaviors.behavior: A new PageHead page cannot be added without registering its scroll owner
behaviors.evidence: client shell-scroll-invariant.test.ts > no page renders a title bar without being in the registry - PASS

behaviors.behavior: .page-head reaches the viewport right edge on all six routes
behaviors.evidence: e2e title-bar-full-bleed.spec.ts (6 route cases) - PASS post-fix; the same spec FAILS 8/8 against the pre-fix production build

behaviors.behavior: Board LIST view bounds its own scroll (title bar not re-clipped on /?view=list)
behaviors.evidence: e2e title-bar-full-bleed.spec.ts route '/?view=list' - PASS; vitest shell-scroll-invariant.test.ts registry maps TaskBoardPage to BOTH scroll owners, mutation-verified (unbounding the list body turns it RED). Found by internal code review: before the fix, /?view=list overflowed the shell by 19238px with headGap 15.

behaviors.behavior: Re-reserving width on the shell scroller is caught wherever it is written
behaviors.evidence: vitest shell-scroll-invariant.test.ts scans MainLayout.tsx + weather-deck.css + SceneBackdrop.tsx for scrollbar-gutter AND overflow-y:scroll; mutation-verified in both MainLayout and weather-deck.css

behaviors.behavior: The bar is fitted to the edge, not pushed past it (no horizontal overflow)
behaviors.evidence: e2e title-bar-full-bleed.spec.ts two-sided gap assertion + scrollWidth<=clientWidth per route - PASS (added after external review)

behaviors.behavior: No route overflows the shell scroller, so no cross-route width spring
behaviors.evidence: e2e title-bar-full-bleed.spec.ts > the shell scroller never scrolls - PASS; shell client width constant 1376px across all six routes

behaviors.behavior: Settings body scrolls internally while its title bar stays put
behaviors.evidence: e2e title-bar-full-bleed.spec.ts > Settings scrolls its own body while the title bar stays put - PASS (added after external review flagged AC4 as untested)

behaviors.behavior: Mission Control's .mc-top bar reaches the right edge
behaviors.evidence: direct differential measurement in headed msedge: gap 15px pre-fix -> 0px post-fix. NOT covered by the automated spec (seeding a task would write the real sdk-sessions.json outside an isolated USERPROFILE); root cause is pinned by behavior 1. Recorded as a known coverage boundary.

behaviors.behavior: Baseline screenshots reflect the 15px-wider title bar
behaviors.evidence: regenerated in the pinned Linux container via visual-baselines.yml; changed-baselines.txt reviewed against the intended route set

known_coverage_boundaries: Real macOS Safari/Edge not exercised (no Mac available); Playwright's WebKit on Windows does not reproduce macOS scrollbar metrics. Defect reproduced and fixed at the same 15px on Windows.
An uncapped lane (PipelineLaneCard) can still overflow the shell in list view: measured 520px lane at 1280x600 overflows by 41px; 260px does not; kanban never does. Pre-existing, recorded not fixed.
/wizard, /tasks/:id and /projects/:id/log verified by hand, not in the automated route list; IntentWizardPage lives outside pages/ so the reverse-drift ratchet cannot see it.
